failedAssertions.reason: WCAG AA contrast not met in current Docker deployment. Light mode: --text-muted (#999999) on white bg = 2.85:1 (need 4.5:1); --link-color (#58a6ff) on white = 2.53:1 (need 4.5:1). Dark mode: --text-muted (#888888) on #242424 = 4.38:1 (need 4.5:1). Note: static/css/style.css has uncommitted local fixes that would resolve all these issues, but Docker was not rebuilt to deploy them.

appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed existing note about Docker rebuild requirement for static file changes. No new knowledge added.

frictions.description: Autocomplete dropdown overlaps submit button when invalid address typed; must press Escape before clicking.
frictions.resolution: Pressed Escape key to dismiss autocomplete before clicking Get Quote.

blockers.description: VAL-POLISH-006: Contrast fix exists in uncommitted static/css/style.css changes (--text-muted: #767676 light, #a5a5a5 dark; --link-color: #2672c1 light) but Docker container was not rebuilt to serve them. The deployed app still has the old failing values.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated current running app. Fix requires: commit the working tree CSS changes, run docker compose build && docker compose up -d, then re-validate.
